# platformImportDefinitions

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformImportDefinitions

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformImportDefinitionsMutation(); mutate({ input: { graphId: '<UUID>', sourceScopeId: '<UUID>', sourceCommitId: '<UUID>', contexts: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformImportDefinitionsMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformImportDefinitionsMutation();
mutate({ input: { graphId: '<UUID>', sourceScopeId: '<UUID>', sourceCommitId: '<UUID>', contexts: '<String>' } });
```
